title: antidesma acidum
intro: Antidesma acidum, also known as the Milin or Cudrang, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin issues and promoting wound healing due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and acting as an antioxidant, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Antidesma acidum is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts are also used in herbal preparations such as tonics and creams to harness its therapeutic properties.
